metadata.description: Kaanha Tech's Claude Code stack: original quality-gate, dev-hub, and video creator-analytics plugins, plus curated pointers to the best open-source skills.

plugins.name: kaanha-quality
plugins.description: Verify-and-test-before-push pipeline: a deterministic PreToolUse gate that blocks git push until the ship workflow has approved the exact HEAD commit, plus tester and adversarial-verifier agents orchestrated by a /ship skill.

plugins.name: kaanha-dev
plugins.description: Centralized dev-server hub: one registry with unique ports for every project, a stdlib launcher (start/stop/status/logs from anywhere), auto-enrollment of new projects, and generated per-project launch.json files.

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.description: By Dietrich Gebert - lazy-senior-dev YAGNI persona with a 7-rung decision ladder. Curated pointer to the upstream project.

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: By Paul Bakaus - design lifecycle toolkit with 23 commands and 44 deterministic anti-slop detectors. Curated pointer to the upstream project.

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: By nextlevelbuilder - offline BM25-searchable design database (styles, palettes, font pairings, stack guidelines). Curated pointer to the upstream project; we recommend enabling just the flagship skill.

plugins.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
plugins.description: By forrestchang - four coding principles distilled from Karpathy's LLM-pitfall observations. Curated pointer to the upstream project.

plugins.name: mempalace
plugins.description: By the MemPalace project - local-first verbatim AI memory with semantic search and a temporal knowledge graph. Curated pointer to the upstream project; requires 'uv tool install mempalace'.

plugins.name: kaanha-ugc
plugins.description: Creator-analytics layer on top of a video engine (watch-skill or claude-video): hook strength, retention/pacing heuristics, scroll-stop moments, CTA placement, best-clip picks per platform, and platform captions/posts. Engine-agnostic; every claim timestamp-anchored, no invented metrics; outputs a self-contained HTML report.

plugins.name: watch-skill
plugins.description: By oxbshw - persistent video memory for agents: analyse a video once, then query it again and search across your whole library. Local-first (local Whisper = offline, $0) with optional cloud vision keys; ships /setup-watch-skill for one-shot machine setup (Python 3.11+; ffmpeg/yt-dlp auto-bootstrap). Curated pointer to the upstream MIT project; the recommended engine for kaanha-ugc.

plugins.name: claude-video
plugins.description: By bradautomates - a /watch command that turns any video URL or local file into timestamped frames + a transcript for Claude's own vision to read. Lightweight watch-once alternative engine for kaanha-ugc. Curated pointer to the upstream MIT project.
